form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.31) when sixth over 527m at this track in a NG. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and three places from seven starts. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 527m in 30.75 last start, beating Sammy's Beach. Has clocked a sharp 30.35 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 15 over 527m at this track behind Cheryl Blue beaten 6 lengths (30.69) in a Grade 5. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last three starts, the latest when third (35.54) at Gosford. Tricky draw to overcome. Looking to others.
